chapter_context.summary: The final wicked reigns of Jehoahaz, Jehoiakim, Jehoiachin, and Zedekiah; Jerusalem is destroyed, and Cyrus issues the return decree.

outline.text: Evil Reigns of Jehoahaz and Jehoiakim; Exiled to Babylon
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Evil Reigns of Jehoahaz and Jehoiakim; Exiled to Babylon (36:1-8), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Jehoiachin's Brief Reign; Exiled to Babylon
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Jehoiachin's Brief Reign; Exiled to Babylon (36:9-10), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Zedekiah's Wicked Reign; Rebellion and Mocking of Prophets
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Zedekiah's Wicked Reign; Rebellion and Mocking of Prophets (36:11-16), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Temple Burned; Jerusalem Walls Leveled; Seventy-Year Exile Starts
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Temple Burned; Jerusalem Walls Leveled; Seventy-Year Exile Starts (36:17-21), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Decree of Cyrus of Persia Permitting Rebuilding of Temple
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Decree of Cyrus of Persia Permitting Rebuilding of Temple (36:22-23), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

key_themes.title: The Temple Centered Kingdom
key_themes.description: The presence of God's glory in the Temple is the absolute center of national blessing and life.

key_themes.title: Immediate Retribution and Reform
key_themes.description: Good kings who seek the LORD experience immediate victory and peace, while unfaithfulness leads to immediate warning and exile.

devotional.question: How do the events of Chapter 36 prompt you to humble yourself, seek God's face, and turn away from compromise?
What practical reforms can you make in your daily walk to ensure your heart is dedicated to God?

cultural_historical.title: The Levitical Worship System
cultural_historical.text: Unlike the Book of Kings, Chronicles highlights the roles of singers, Levites, and liturgical musicians in the temple's daily administration.
